title: Bihar BPSC 72 Pre Exam Online Form 2026 for 1186 Post
short_information: Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the notification for the recruitment of Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following BPSC 72 Pre Exam 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 07/05/2026 to 31/05/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in BPSC Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Recruitment 2026. Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) Bihar BPSC Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026 Bihar BPSC 72nd CCE Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / BC/ Other State : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 100/- Female Candidate (Bihar Dom.) : 100/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only BPSC 72 Exam
